creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to timp87 from comment #10)

As far as the "for next time", looking at http://www.squid-cache.org/Versions/v3/3.5/squid-3.5.6.patch it isn't clear from the change log they were considering any of the fixes to be security issues and planning on doing CVE/security advisory for it.  I think you did everything you could do.
